records.question: Which customers have an address at 27839 Carissa Tunnel Suite 048?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN premises ON customer_addresses.premise_id = premises.premise_id
WHERE premises.premise_details = '27839 Carissa Tunnel Suite 048'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.customer_id
FROM Customers AS T1
INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses AS T2
  ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id
INNER JOIN Premises AS T3
  ON T2.premise_id = T3.premise_id
WHERE
  T3.premise_details = '27839 Carissa Tunnel Suite 048'

records.question: Which customers named Stella live at 5607 Ryann Canyon with the email kristina85@example.org, phone +43(3)1861877192, and use Direct Debit as their payment method?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Stella' AND customers.customer_address = '5607 Ryann Canyon' AND customers.customer_email = 'kristina85@example.org' AND customers.customer_phone = '+43(3)1861877192' AND customers.payment_method = 'Direct Debit'

records.question: Which customers named Geovanny live at 0813 Carolina Bridge Suite 488?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_address = '0813 Carolina Bridge Suite 488' AND customers.customer_name = 'Geovanny'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 WHERE T1.customer_address = '0813 Carolina Bridge Suite 488' AND T1.customer_name = 'Geovanny' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Mailshot_Customers AS T2 WHERE T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id)

records.question: What customers have the email elva.mccullough@example.org and phone number (840)754-4148x20545, whose shipping address was active exactly on March 13, 2018 at 08:21:27, and have orders delivered on or after March 20, 2018 at 12:00:00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_to = '2018-03-13 08:21:27' AND customers.customer_phone = '(840)754-4148x20545' AND customer_orders.order_delivered_datetime >= '2018-03-20 12:00:00' AND customers.customer_email = 'elva.mccullough@example.org' AND customer_addresses.address_type_code = 'Shipping'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT
  T1.customer_id
FROM Customers AS T1
INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses AS T2
  ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id
INNER JOIN Customer_Orders AS T3
  ON T1.customer_id = T3.customer_id
WHERE
  T1.customer_phone = '(840)754-4148x20545' AND T1.customer_email = 'elva.mccullough@example.org' AND T2.date_address_to = '2018-03-13 08:21:27' AND T2.address_type_code = 'Shipping' AND T3.order_delivered_datetime >= '2018-03-20 12:00:00'

records.question: Which customers who received mailshots had orders delivered on or before 2018-03-20 12:00:00?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
JOIN mailshot_customers ON customers.customer_id = mailshot_customers.customer_id
WHERE customer_orders.order_delivered_datetime <= '2018-03-20 12:00:00'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT
  T1.customer_id
FROM Customers AS T1
INNER JOIN Customer_Orders AS T2
  ON T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id
INNER JOIN Mailshot_Customers AS T3
  ON T1.customer_id = T3.customer_id
WHERE
  T2.order_delivered_datetime <= '2018-03-20 12:00:00'

records.question: Which customers named Geovanny, whose password is 49f32173a2 and phone is 205.496.0690x53058, have placed orders on or after 2010-04-29 08:21:49?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customers.customer_name = 'Geovanny' AND customer_orders.order_placed_datetime >= '2010-04-29 08:21:49' AND customers.customer_password = '49f32173a2' AND customers.customer_phone = '205.496.0690x53058'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.customer_id FROM Customers AS T1 WHERE T1.customer_name = 'Geovanny' AND T1.customer_password = '49f32173a2' AND T1.customer_phone = '205.496.0690x53058' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM Customer_Orders AS T2 WHERE T1.customer_id = T2.customer_id AND T2.order_placed_datetime >= '2010-04-29 08:21:49' )
